name: Email Triage & Smart Reply Agent
description: Reads your inbox, categorizes emails by urgency and type, drafts context-aware replies, and surfaces action items. Ask me to triage your inbox, draft a reply to an email, or extract action items from your messages.
instructions: See instructions.md for the full system prompt.

conversation_starters.text: Triage my inbox for the last 24 hours
Draft a reply to the email from the procurement team
Extract all action items from my emails this week
Which emails from executives need my attention today?
